purpose: P7 frozen all-filter/all-model preflight matrix. Cells are wiring/status evidence only and are not benchmark performance evidence.

preflight_scope.no_silent_holes_policy: every algorithm/model pair must have a structured cell and reason code

run_manifest.git_commit: dirty worktree; P7 generated artifact uncommitted
run_manifest.command: Generated from P1/P4/P5/P6 reviewed manifests using local Python json expansion; validation command is pytest on P7 focused tests.
run_manifest.dtype: manifest-level only; per-row dtype lives in P1 registry
run_manifest.seeds: N/A for coverage expansion; smoke payload seeds retained per smoke_payload when present

nonclaims: preflight values are not benchmark values
no HMC, GPU, or Bayesian-estimation readiness
